caption: A man wearing glasses, a light blue traditional garment with dark blue embroidery, and a dark blue cap with a white emblem is shown in a medium shot. He is positioned against a blurred background with other people partially visible. The scene is framed by a television broadcast overlay. A purple "plustv" logo appears in the upper left of the video area. A purple banner across the middle contains the text "PLUS POLITICS" followed by a larger white banner with the text "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU" in bold black letters. Below this, a white strip contains "WATCH ONLINE" in red on the left and the web address "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" in black on the right. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains mostly stationary, maintaining a neutral facial expression while looking slightly to his right, with very minimal changes in his posture or the background.
